description: Exception: recovery from a household mix-up can only travel the lawful path — endpoint equality or household-address agreement can never authorize a merge or transfer consent, no matter how many endpoint facts agree; the lawful basis is a human decision over merge-sufficient attributes.

cases.expectError: can never authorize an identity merge

cases.expectError: can never authorize an identity merge
